Index.title: Token Swap Hub
Index.subtitle: Share idle tokens, earn credits, and consume collective AI power.

Dashboard.title: Dashboard
Dashboard.directedUsageTip: Directed usage is not counted in total quota, credits, or rankings
Dashboard.platformKeyTip: Use this key as your Bearer token and the platform URL as the base URL.
Dashboard.noTokens: You haven't provided any tokens yet.
Dashboard.confirmRevoke: Are you sure you want to stop sharing this token?
Dashboard.allowedUsersTip: Directed tokens are free for both parties (no points charged)

Dashboard.toolsSubtitle: Quota management, multi-platform monitoring and more features are under development.
Dashboard.announcementTitle: ⚠️ Platform in Testing — Your Feedback Matters
Dashboard.announcementContent:
🚧 The platform is currently in testing. Some features may be unstable.

📩 If you find any bugs, email hhuhzl@outlook.com with details. Confirmed valid bugs will be rewarded with tokens!

---

📌 Platform Features:
🔑 Share Tokens → Earn credits
💎 Spend credits → Use collective AI power
🎯 Directed sharing → Friends use for free, no credits or rankings impact
🏆 Leaderboard → See community rankings (excludes directed)
🌐 Supported: OpenAI / DeepSeek / Zhipu / Moonshot / Qwen / Claude / Gemini / Groq / Mistral

Thank you for your participation and support!
